columns.player_id: canonical gsis_id (verified 2026-07-19: pbp's rusher/receiver_player_id are already gsis_id, no crosswalk join needed)
columns.week: week number (REG only -- pull_pbp filters season_type == 'REG', matching ground_truth.py/charter §3)
columns.team: posteam, normalized LA->LAR per this project's convention (capture/sources/nflverse.py)
columns.rz_targets: pass attempts targeting this player with yardline_100 <= 20
columns.rz_pass_tds: of rz_targets, how many were touchdowns
columns.rz_carries: rush attempts by this player with yardline_100 <= 20
columns.rz_rush_tds: of rz_carries, how many were touchdowns
columns.designed_carries: ALL non-red-zone-restricted rush attempts by this player where qb_scramble != 1 and qb_kneel != 1 (season-long run-call profile, not red-zone-only)
columns.scramble_carries: same scope as designed_carries but qb_scramble == 1 -- nonzero only for QBs by construction
